Channel ingress mirrors external messages into canonical GitHub issues, then wakes the normal handler with `workflow_dispatch`. Channel message bodies, issue bodies, and tokens are not included in this report.

### Workflow
- `.github/workflows/gitclaw-channel-ingest.yml` bytes=`2263` lines=`71` workflow_dispatch=`true` actions_write=`true` issues_write=`true` inputs=`5` sha256_12=`1b1cde85c6b0`
- `.github/workflows/gitclaw-channel-state.yml` bytes=`1437` lines=`50` workflow_dispatch=`true` issues_write=`true` inputs=`4` sha256_12=`7be973bbc095`
- `.github/workflows/gitclaw-channel-gateway.yml` bytes=`3115` lines=`89` workflow_dispatch=`true` actions_write=`true` issues_write=`true` inputs=`6` sha256_12=`6b46ecf0a6b4`
- `.github/workflows/gitclaw-channel-delivery.yml` bytes=`1755` lines=`55` workflow_dispatch=`true` issues_write=`true` inputs=`6` sha256_12=`33be09897bc2`

### Providers
- `telegram`
- `slack`
- `generic`

### Ingest Contract
- `gitclaw channel-ingest --channel <provider> --thread-id <thread> --message-id <message> --body <text>`
- `gitclaw channel-state --channel <provider> --account-id <account> --offset <offset>` stores durable provider offsets as hashes
- `gitclaw channel-gateway --channel <provider> --account-id <account> [--renew]` records a gateway lease and can self-renew through workflow dispatch
- `gitclaw channel-delivery --channel <provider> --account-id <account> --issue-number <issue> --comment-id <comment> --external-message-id <message>` records outbound delivery receipts
- one canonical issue per `channel + thread_id`
- one mirrored comment per `channel + message_id`
- dispatch id: `<channel>-<message_id>`

@gitclaw Use the repo-reader skill and search the repository for `channels list unique search fixture phrase`.

The matching repository search result line has the form `channels list unique search fixture phrase => <token>`.
Reply with only the token after the arrow from the matching gitclaw.search_files tool output line.
Do not answer with any token from this issue or its comments.
Do not include this hidden follow-up token: NOECHO_CHANNELS_LIST_FOLLOWUP_20260531T135529Z
Keep the answer under 30 words.
